tagline: San Diego's premier LGBTQ-owned restaurant and only urban oasis
description: insideOUT is an elevated restaurant and lounge located in Hillcrest, San Diego, featuring California-Mediterranean inspired cuisine curated by Executive Chef Johnny Duran. The venue combines a sophisticated main dining room with handcrafted tables and an open-air atrium with walkways and water features. Known for outstanding customer service, over-the-top seasonal experiences, and creating a safe, welcoming space for all guests.
social_proof: LGBTQ-owned restaurant, multiple positive Yelp reviews praising service and food quality, described as having one of the most unique dining experiences in San Diego
key_cta: Book a table through OpenTable or call for reservations
missing: Business hours not displayed, no online menu preview on homepage, no staff/team photos, no current event calendar details, no pricing information, no private events inquiry form
brand_vibe: Modern urban luxury, welcoming LGBTQ-friendly, upscale yet approachable
pain_point: No clear online booking integration on the homepage makes reservation process less frictionless than competitors.
chat_persona: Be warm, enthusiastic, and inclusive while providing expert recommendations about menu items, events, and the unique atmosphere that makes insideOUT special.
cta_angle: Reserve a Table for an Unforgettable Dining Experience or Inquire About Private Events
